home.heroSubtitle: 107 homes with 2, 3 and 4 bedrooms featuring spacious terraces, infinity pool and natural surroundings.
home.aboutText1: La Nucía ONE has been designed to capture the characteristic light of its surroundings at every moment of the day, enhancing the sense of space, wellbeing and connection with the outdoors.
home.aboutText2: Here you'll find communal areas adapted to every need because every space is designed to connect and enjoy: infinity pool, fully equipped gym, social lounge, children's area, landscaped gardens and much more.
home.locationText: Set in surroundings where the outdoors, sport and wellbeing are part of everyday life, and where the area's growth guarantees not only quality of life but also a strong projection of value.
home.homesText: Spacious homes with 2, 3 and 4 bedrooms, large terraces, ground-floor duplexes and private solariums on the penthouses.
home.type3desc: Perfect balance between space and functionality
home.galleryText: Discover every corner of La Nucía ONE: facades, interiors, communal areas and the privileged setting that surrounds this development.
home.contactText: Contact us to book a private visit in Alicante, Madrid or Online, where we'll share every detail and condition with no obligation.

stats.desc1: Space, light and a carefully designed layout.
stats.desc2: Enjoy the pool, coworking, gym and much more.

ubicacionPage.title: Privileged location
ubicacionPage.statSun: Min walk to La Nucía Shopping Centre
ubicacionPage.aboutText1: La Nucía is one of the municipalities with the highest quality of life on the Costa Blanca, very close to the spectacular Serra Gelada Natural Park and just minutes from the sea, combining the tranquility of the interior with proximity to all coastal services.
ubicacionPage.aboutText2: Its excellent sports and cultural infrastructure, including the Ciudad Deportiva Camilo Cano, make La Nucía ONE a unique destination for families, athletes and those seeking an active Mediterranean lifestyle.

advantages.title: Mountains & Sea
advantages.description: Between natural parks and Costa Blanca beaches.

advantages.title: Full services
advantages.description: La Nucía Shopping Center is just minutes away with supermarkets, dining and all services.

advantages.title: Nearby beaches
advantages.description: Very close to iconic beaches such as Playa de Levante and Playa de Poniente in Benidorm.

ubicacionPage.mapTitle: Close to everything you're looking for
ubicacionPage.mapSubtitle: La Nucía ONE offers an exceptional quality of life, surrounded by services, nature and connectivity with the main cities of Alicante.

viviendasPage.heroSubtitle: Space, wellbeing and connection with the outdoors thanks to homes with large terraces, ground-floor duplexes and penthouses with solarium.
viviendasPage.conceptText1: La Nucía One is born from the idea of creating a residential complex that combines contemporary architecture with the Mediterranean lifestyle. Each home has been designed to maximise light, views and functionality.
viviendasPage.conceptText2: The homes open to the outdoors through large windows and generous terraces, allowing natural light to flow through every room. By offering diverse typologies, the homes adapt to all kinds of needs and preferences.

types.title: 2 Bedrooms
types.description: Optimised layout with spacious terraces. Ideal for couples or as an investment.

types.title: 3 Bedrooms
types.description: The perfect balance between space and functionality for the whole family.

types.title: 4 Bedrooms
types.description: Maximum space and comfort with premium finishes.

featuresList.description: Climalit-type glass windows for maximum insulation
